entities.name: self-awareness
entities.context: The system's ability to reason about its own components.

entities.name: self-healing
entities.context: The integration of detection and correction into every workflow.

entities.name: platform agnostic
entities.context: The approach of not committing to a single tool but orchestrating across best-in-class.

entities.name: Flow over structure
entities.context: Design principle focusing on the movement of information rather than organization.

entities.name: Minimal touch
entities.context: The idea of reducing one's role to the approval of key decisions.
